name: SECKEL SYNDROME
definition: BIRD-HEADED DWARFISM rare autosomal recessive disorder (44 cases)
discriminating_features: receding forehead, large beaked nose, micrognathia
dislocation of radial head + hypoplasia of proximal end of radius

general: receding forehead, large beaked nose, micrognathia
Skeleton: dislocation of radial head + hypoplasia of proximal end of radius
decreased bone length: femur, tibia, fibula
